Full Moon is a line of hemp-derived edible gummies containing 10 mg of Delta 9 THC and 10 mg of CBD. Full moon is a double dose of the 5mg standard, legal dosage in MN. Pop one of these and snuggle up for a movie, take a stroll or zen out.

products.description:
Strawberry Mango

GOODNIGHT MOON is a hemp-derived gummy containing 5 mg THC + 10 mg CBD + 15 mg CBN. This gummy was designed to help you sleep. CBN (cannabinol) is one of the 100+ cannabinoids found in the cannabis plant. CBN has shown to have sedative properties that could relieve conditions like insomnia. Strawberry

products.name: FrootByTheFoot (Atlas)
products.description:
Frooty + Gassy = Amazing

Froot by the Foot (Mythic OG x Cotton Candy) throws out a wild terp profile that’s both sweet and funky. Up front you get that candied fruit sweetness, but it’s layered with a deeper, overripe/rotting fruit funk that makes it loud and unique. The backend brings a wave of fuel, tying it all together with a sharp gassy punch that balances the sweetness perfectly. 

The high from Froot by the Foot is super relaxing at first, like a full-body melt, but then it flips into th

products.name: ZestyParm (Phylos)
products.description:
Zesty, Gassy Delicousness

Cherry Kush x (Lemon Tree Papaya x GMO) x Fro'Do.

Zesty Parm is a sativa-dominant hybrid cannabis strain known for its unique savory, citrus, and cheesy aroma, often described as lemon-pepper parmesan. It is popular for producing uplifting, creative, and energetic effects, making it a suitable choice for daytime use, socializing, or creative projects.

products.name: GRAV Quartz Tip Cones Tall-King 3pk
products.description:
Upgrade your smoking ritual with GRAV Tall Kings Quartz Tip Cones. These 109mm cones, made from unbleached or black soy-dyed all-natural wood pulp paper, come with a quartz glass tip for a smoother hit and easy smoking experience. Each pack contains three cones, ready to elevate your smoking experience.

109mm cones with quartz glass tips

products.name: Atlas - Cheetah the Hut Fem 5pk
products.description: We bred in our Gelato 41 selection that had a significant amount of frosty trichomes with a select gassy pheno of Cheetah Piss to create this frost / gas combination. Frosty flowers radiate out with fruity lemon notes dominated by the gassy scent of petrol fuel. Cheetah the hut lets your body relax while your mind floats away to happy escapes.HybridFlowering Time : 65 – 75 daysYield : AverageTerpene Profile : Fuel, Funk

products.name: Atlas - Cosmic Crashers Fem 5pk
products.description:
Atlas has developed a new cannabis strain by taking a select cutting of Wedding Crashers (Wedding Cake x Purple Punch) that tested high for potency and crossing it with a selection of Oreoz that was laden with frosty trichromes. The Wedding Crashers strain is known for being more leafy than Atlas would like, but it makes up for it with very loud and fruity terpenes.
The Oreoz cross that was used in the development of this strain has a slightly longer flowering time due to its shared Wedding Cake

products.name: Atlas - Gopher Glue Fem 1pk
products.description: Gopher Glue FAST is a potent and highly sought-after cannabis strain that has been developed by crossing Original Glue (GG#4) with Cotton Candy Auto. This hybrid strain is 60% indica and 40% sativa, making it a well-balanced cannabis variety that can provide a combination of both mental and physical effects.Cultivation:Gopher Glue FAST is a photoperiod feminised cannabis strain that is easy to cultivate, even for beginners. The plant structure is sturdy and bushy, with a height of around 120cm.

products.name: Atlas - Laundry Shaman Fem 5pk
products.description: Laundry Shaman (formerly Papaya Bomb x GMO) is an indica-dominant (60%) hybrid created by crosssing Galactic Guava with GMO Soda. Galactic Guava is the new name for Papaya Bomb and had to be changed due to copyright claims.Laundry Shaman plants display lots of vigor and excellent mould-resistance. Indoors, flowering takes 63 days producing above-average yields. products.name: Atlas - Papaya Candy Fem 5pk
products.description: Papaya Candy Fast Feminised by Atlas Seed is a rapid-flowering, terpene-rich hybrid developed in collaboration with Purple City Genetics. products.name: Atlas - Sour Cherry Diesel Fem 5pk
products.description: Sour Cherry Diesel is a 50/50 indica/sativa hybrid strain bred by crossing a Sour Diesel with Cherry Pie. The two main phenotypes have differing flowering times.Sour Cherry Diesel can be cultivated indoors, outdoors or in a greenhouse.
